name: research
description: v2.4.0 - Adds report-format structural extensions (Theory/Related Work/Ablation/Discussion/References sections, Figure-as-argument convention, Statistical reporting minimum), theoretical plan mode for derivational research, and iterative_ideation protocol (F v2: MANDATORY Bash execution, self-simulation EXPLICITLY FORBIDDEN, evolutionary candidate update with mutation/crossover/wildcard for applied/development plans with executable evaluators).

interface.shortDescription: Agent-driven R&D protocol for basic/applied/development research with claim and analysis discipline
interface.longDescription: v2.4.0 - A protocol skill for agent-driven R&D across the three OECD Frascati Manual 2015 categories. Includes the research lifecycle (observation discovery → hypothesis synthesis → intervention → prior-work grounding → plan → execution → analysis → claim → decision). Plan modes: exploratory, confirmatory, milestone, theoretical (the last is for derivational work with axioms / definitions / limiting-case checks rather than empirical evaluation). Research ideation separates de-anchored raw candidate generation from observation discovery, hypothesis rationale, grounded pruning, and information-gain scoring. Prior work has two roles: material for observations and grounding after candidates exist. Approach transition criteria connect results to NEXT_STEP, REFINE, ADJACENT, PARK, and CLOSE. v2.3.0 added references/assumption_audit.md, which surfaces background assumptions of the reference model being challenged — distinct from the anchor audit on imported prior work — using a load-bearing audit with downstream-check, unknown-unknowns catalog, manual reference-class forecasting, and constraint-naming for un-evaluable hypotheses. v2.4.0 adds references/iterative_ideation.md (F v2): an AlphaEvolve-style evolutionary ideation protocol with MANDATORY Bash execution and EXPLICITLY FORBIDDEN self-simulation, for applied/experimental_development plans whose domain has an existing executable evaluator (e.g., quant-research/scripts/walk_forward.py with CLI). v2.4.0 also extends report_format.md with Theory/Related Work/Ablation/Discussion/References sections, a Figure-as-argument convention, and a basic-research-theoretical sub-mode; and extends claim_structure.md with a Statistical reporting minimum (effect size, CI, n, variance, significance) for numeric evidence. SKILL.md reinforces the role boundary: this skill regulates innovation honesty but does not generate paradigm-shift ideas. Methods reproducibility is enforced; experiment-level replicability is the agent's discretion, while provenance and claim-to-artifact checks are treated as audit/evidence-integrity controls.
defaultPrompt: Design an R&D plan for this investigation
Help me decide what to do after this experimental result
Write a human-readable report from this plan and runs
